response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack experience including a current Staff Software Engineer role at Naver with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns with the AI-native environment. However, the resume shows no clear Python expertise (a must-have), limited evidence of large-scale distributed systems design ownership at staff level, and the listed skills emphasize JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and PHP rather than the required Python depth. Worth a screening call to verify Python proficiency and distributed-systems depth before committing to a full loop.
strengths: Current Staff-level role with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience
Prior work on high-throughput micro-services handling millions of requests/second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Python is not listed in skills and no role demonstrates strong Python usage — a stated must-have
Limited explicit evidence of distributed-systems architecture ownership or design-patterns mastery at staff scope
No mention of on-call rotation, incident response, or operational ownership experience
